name: HL7DefinedPropertyCS
title: HL7-Defined Property CodeSystem
description: A CodeSystem containing HL7-defined property concepts for use with FHIR CodeSystems. Content for this codesystem is drawn from the following references:  1) https://hl7.org/fhir/terminology-service.html#standard-props  2) https://terminology.hl7.org/SNOMEDCT.html#snomed-ct-properties

concept.definition: The name of the code system
The version of the code system used for the look up operation
The recommended display for the concept, if one is known
This is the effectiveTime value from the RF2 concepts file (from the snapshot).
The SNOMED CT concept id of the module that the concept belongs to.
Generated Necessary Normal Form expression for the provided code or expression, with terms. The normal form expressions are not suitable for use in subsumption testing.
Generated Necessary Normal form expression for the provided code or expression, concept ids only. The normal form expressions are not suitable for use in subsumption testing.
The phrase inside the last set of brackets of its Fully Specified Name.

True if the description logic definition of the concept includes sufficient conditions. This is derived from the definitionStatusId value in the Concept file of the RF2 distribution (i.e. If 900000000000073002 |Sufficiently defined concept definition status| then true).

property.description: Indicates the FHIR data type associated with the concept.
